summary: Dual-angle code review then WEA master: two read-only reviewers (correctness vs maintainability) then master prioritizes findings and dispatches fix graph. Tags: review audit security quality handoff master parallel.

nodes.promptTemplate:
Review task (CORRECTNESS / safety angle):
${task}

You are a READ-ONLY reviewer A (pi). Focus on bugs, edge cases, races, nulls, authz, data loss, incorrect APIs. Do not rewrite code.

OUTPUT: exactly one JSON object:
{
  "summary": "<correctness posture>",
  "angle": "correctness",
  "findings": [{"severity": "high|med|low", "where": "path:symbol", "issue": "...", "suggest": "direction only"}],
  "files_seen": ["..."],
  "change_surface": ["if fixes needed"],
  "subtasks": ["..."],
  "risks": ["..."]
}

Review task (MAINTAINABILITY / design angle):
${task}

You are a READ-ONLY reviewer B (pi). Focus on structure, duplication, naming, test gaps, API clarity, complexity. Do not rewrite code.

OUTPUT: exactly one JSON object:
{
  "summary": "<maintainability posture>",
  "angle": "maintainability",
  "findings": [{"severity": "high|med|low", "where": "path:symbol", "issue": "...", "suggest": "direction only"}],
  "files_seen": ["..."],
  "change_surface": ["..."],
  "subtasks": ["..."],
  "risks": ["..."]
}
